body_plan.core_shape: long horse-like head fused to a bulky scalloped-edged hexagonal body

parts.shape: elongated wedge-shaped horse head with pointed single ear/horn on top
parts.placement: front-left, attached directly to body via narrow neck

parts.shape: large hexagonal/rounded torso with scalloped bumpy fringe along top edge
numeral '3' drawn in thick black outline
parts.placement: center of body, like a marking or tag
along top curved edge of body
underside of body, evenly spaced along bottom edge

parts.shape: long looping squiggly line forming cursive 'e e e'-like curls
parts.placement: rear-right, extending from back of body

distinctive_features: horse-like head with single pointed horn/ear fused directly onto a much larger scalloped body
numeral '3' rendered as a marking on the torso
scalloped bumpy fringe running along the top edge of the body
many short thin legs (eight) lined along the belly
long looping cursive-squiggle tail resembling repeated 'e' shapes
locomotion: skitters along on its many short thin legs, dragging its long curly tail behind
vibe: a horse-headed, number-branded lawn ornament tromping about on centipede-like legs
